name: che-transport-mcp
description: Taiwan TDX transport MCP — 24 tools across Rail / Bus / Bike / Air / Traffic / Parking (multi-modal TRA↔Taipei-Metro routing via transit_route). Distributed as a self-contained marketplace: this repo holds the binary source, the plugin shell, and the marketplace catalog.

plugins.name: che-transport-mcp
plugins.description: Wraps the PsychQuant/che-transport-mcp binary (binaryVersion-pinned auto-download + sha256 sidecar). 24 tools: rail (incl. rail_route time-dependent + metro_find_route), transit_route (TRA↔Taipei-Metro multi-modal), bus, bike, air, traffic, parking. 3-tier cache TTL, NSQL confirmation discipline.
